prompt:
Ultra-realistic super cute chaotic Eid al-Adha selfie photograph in front of a dreamy pastel-toned grand mosque during bright sunny afternoon, featuring an adorable stylish young woman taking a playful ultra-wide-angle smartphone selfie surrounded by wholesome animal chaos.
She wears a soft fluffy pastel cream oversized cardigan layered over a delicate flowy white lace dress, paired with chunky pastel sneakers, tiny heart jewelry, and cute hair accessories. Her long dark wavy hair flows naturally in the warm breeze with colorful mini clips and ribbon pins scattered throughout. The girl smiles brightly with sparkling eyes while making a tiny finger-heart pose toward the camera, radiating bubbly “cute chaos” energy.
Camera style: extreme fisheye selfie perspective, exaggerated smartphone distortion, playful close-up framing, candid TikTok / Instagram selfie aesthetic, dynamic arm-reaching composition, chaotic but cinematic social media energy.
Surrounding her are adorable expressive farm animals creating funny wholesome chaos: • fluffy baby goat wearing tiny pink sunglasses • giant photobombing cow with pastel flower crown smiling beside her • another baby goat jumping happily in background • tiny fluffy chicks waddling around her sneakers • sleepy sheep sitting adorably in foreground • mischievous goat extremely close to lens trying to lick the camera
Background features a stunning cream-white grand mosque with glowing domes and elegant tall minarets under a soft pastel blue sky with fluffy warm clouds. Busy Eid celebration atmosphere with laughing families, people taking selfies, soft festival movement, cheerful wholesome energy everywhere.
Add playful doodle overlays across the image: pastel hearts, sparkles, glitter stars, smiley stickers, comic arrows pointing toward animals, handwritten meme texts in BOTH Arabic and English such as: “عيد أضحى سعيد ✨ / Happy Eid al-Adha ✨” “يا لطيف 😭 / HELP 😭” “أفضل صديقة العيد 🐐 / Eid Bestie 🐐” “لطيف أكثر من اللازم / Too Cute To Handle” “آآآآ 😭 / AAAAA 😭” “وقت القيلولة 💤 / Nap Time 💤” Large pastel handwritten doodle typography at the top: “عيد أضحى مبارك ✨ Eid Mubarak ✨” Lighting: bright warm afternoon sunlight, dreamy glow, soft overexposed highlights, subtle lens flare, pastel color grading, vibrant HDR smartphone realism, cozy cinematic textures.
